title: Italian White Jacquard Tuxedo Set
description: Crafted from exquisite Italian Jacquard fabric, this white tuxedo set showcases a refined woven texture that elevates classic formalwear. The intricate Jacquard pattern is subtly raised within the fabric, creating depth, dimension, and a sophisticated play of light across the surface. Unlike flat fabrics, this design feels rich, structured, and truly premium. The fabric offers a crisp yet graceful drape, making it ideal for precision tailoring while ensuring comfort and breathability. The result is a sharp, polished silhouette that balances traditional elegance with modern luxury. Perfect for weddings, destination ceremonies, black-tie evenings, and high-profile celebrations, this tuxedo is a statement of impeccable Italian craftsmanship.

title: Italian Black Textured Velvet Tuxedo Set
description: Crafted from rich Italian velvet, this black tuxedo set exudes depth, refinement, and timeless elegance. The fabric showcases a finely textured, plush surface that subtly plays with light and shadow, creating a dimensional, sophisticated finish rather than a flat matte look. The premium velvet has a soft, smooth hand-feel while maintaining tailored structure, allowing for sharp lines and a sculpted silhouette. Its weight and drape give the garment a regal presence, making it ideal for formal evenings, black-tie events, weddings, and luxury celebrations. This tuxedo seamlessly blends classic formal tradition with modern velvet sophistication—perfect for the man who wants to stand out with understated power.

title: Italian White Textured Tuxedo Set
description: Crafted from refined Italian suiting fabric, this white tuxedo set delivers modern elegance with a subtle textured finish. The fabric features a fine, evenly patterned surface that adds depth and dimension while maintaining a clean, sophisticated appearance. Instead of a flat white, the material reflects light softly, giving the ensemble a premium, high-fashion presence. Designed for sharp tailoring, the fabric holds structure beautifully while remaining comfortable and breathable. The result is a crisp, polished silhouette that works perfectly for weddings, formal celebrations, destination events, and luxury evening occasions. This tuxedo blends classic formal tradition with contemporary Italian craftsmanship for a truly standout look.

title: Italian Midnight Velvet Tuxedo Ensemble
description: Crafted from rich Italian velvet, this tuxedo set embodies depth, softness, and understated glamour. The fabric features a finely textured, dense pile that catches light subtly, creating a dimensional, shadowed effect rather than a flat surface. This gives the ensemble a regal presence while maintaining modern minimalism. The velvet’s smooth hand-feel and structured weight allow for sharp tailoring lines, ensuring a clean silhouette without stiffness. Perfect for evening wear, black-tie events, weddings, and luxury celebrations, this tuxedo merges classic formal style with contemporary velvet elegance.

title: Embroidered Indo-Western Sherwani Jacket
description: Elevate your festive and ceremonial wardrobe with this luxurious Indo-Western Sherwani Jacket, crafted for modern elegance with traditional artistry. Designed in a rich black base, this outfit features intricate gold floral embroidery inspired by heritage motifs, giving it a regal and timeless appeal. The structured silhouette, paired with a sleek band collar, creates a sharp and sophisticated look suitable for weddings, receptions, festive celebrations, and formal ethnic occasions. The premium fabric ensures comfort while maintaining a polished finish, making it ideal for extended wear. This Indo-Western piece blends classic Indian craftsmanship with contemporary tailoring — perfect for men who prefer understated luxury with bold detailing.

title: Premium Black Italian Tuxedo Set
description: Make a bold and sophisticated statement with this Luxury Black Tuxedo Set, expertly tailored from high-quality Italian fabric. The fabric offers a smooth finish, rich texture, and structured drape, ensuring a sharp, polished, and elegant appearance. This classic tuxedo features a sleek fitted blazer with satin lapels, a structured shoulder, and a refined single-button closure, giving it a timeless formal look. It is paired with perfectly tailored black trousers that provide a clean silhouette and comfortable fit. The crisp white shirt and black bow tie (as styled in the image) enhance the overall formal appeal.

title: Elegant Green Silk Kurta Pajama Set for Men
description: Make a refined style statement with this Premium Silk Kurta Pajama Set, crafted from high-quality soft silk fabric that offers a smooth finish, lightweight feel, and luxurious drape. The fabric has a subtle sheen that enhances its richness while keeping the look classy and sophisticated. The kurta features a straight-cut silhouette with a structured collar, full sleeves, and clean minimal detailing, making it suitable for festivals, weddings, poojas, and formal occasions. The matching silk pajama is tailored for comfort and ease of movement, completing the traditional yet modern ensemble.

title: Men’s Black Italian Kurta Pyjama Set
description: Step into refined elegance with this Premium Black Kurta Pajama Set, tailored from high-quality Italian fabric that offers a smooth texture, lightweight feel, and excellent drape. The fabric provides a rich matte finish with a subtle sheen, making it perfect for festive and formal occasions. The kurta features a clean straight-cut design with a structured collar, full sleeves, and minimal detailing that highlights its sophisticated look. The matching black pajama is comfortably tailored to complement the kurta, ensuring ease of movement and all-day comfort.

title: Classic Black Italian Kurta Pajama
description: Add timeless elegance to your ethnic wardrobe with this Black Italian Fabric Kurta Pajama Set. Crafted from high-quality Italian fabric, this outfit offers a smooth texture, soft touch, and excellent drape, ensuring both comfort and style. The kurta features a classic straight-cut silhouette with a refined collar, full sleeves, and minimal detailing, making it perfect for festive occasions, weddings, poojas, and formal gatherings. The matching tailored pajama complements the kurta beautifully, providing a relaxed yet sophisticated look.

title: White Elegance Italian Kurta Pajama Set

The kurta features elegant embroidery detailing on the neckline and sleeves, paired with a perfectly tailored pajama for all-day comfort. Ideal for weddings, festive occasions, and cultural celebrations, this ensemble reflects understated luxury and classic charm.

title: Midnight Navy Velvet Tuxedo Suit
description: Make a powerful style statement with this Midnight Navy Two-Piece Tuxedo Suit, crafted from luxurious cotton velvet fabric for a smooth texture and refined sheen. Perfect for receptions, cocktail parties, red-carpet events, and formal celebrations, it blends classic sophistication with modern elegance.

title: Royal Teal Italian Fabric Kurta Pyjama Set

description: Elevate your formal style with this Wine Embroidered Two-Piece Suit, crafted from premium embroidered fabric with a subtle textured pattern. Perfect for weddings, red-carpet events, gala nights, receptions, and high-end parties, this tuxedo blends contemporary design with classic tuxedo styling.

title: Slim Fit Blue Velvet Tuxedo Set
description: Step into refined elegance with this Men’s Teal Cotton Velvet 2-Piece Tuxedo Suit, designed to deliver a rich, luxurious look with modern sophistication. Perfect for weddings, evening parties, receptions, and formal celebrations, this teal tuxedo stands out with timeless charm and bold color.

title: Men’s Black 3-Piece Slim Fit Tuxedo
description: Make a powerful style statement with this Men’s 3-Piece Black Tuxedo Suit, crafted for luxury occasions and refined elegance. Designed with a modern slim-fit silhouette, this tuxedo features a sharply tailored jacket accented with elegant embroidered detailing along the front panels, adding a distinctive and premium touch. The set includes a matching waistcoat and trousers, creating a polished, coordinated look ideal for black-tie events, weddings, receptions, and formal evenings. The satin shawl lapel enhances its classic tuxedo appeal, while the structured tailoring ensures a confident, flattering fit.

title: Men’s Teal Tuxedo with Embroidery
description: Make a bold statement with this elegant 2-piece teal tuxedo suit, crafted for modern men who appreciate luxury and style. Paired with classic tailored trousers, this suit ensures a sharp, polished silhouette perfect for special occasions.

description: Step into refined luxury with this Designer Tuxedo Suit, crafted from premium cotton velvet fabric in an elegant deep blue shade. Designed with a structured fit and classic tuxedo elements, this ensemble delivers both comfort and high-end appeal. Perfect for weddings, receptions, cocktail parties, and evening events, this blue velvet tuxedo is ideal for men who want to stand out with timeless elegance and contemporary style.

title: Black Italian Fabric Designer Tuxedo
description: Make a powerful style statement with this Italian Fabric Designer Tuxedo Suit, crafted in classic Black for a refined and luxurious look. Expertly tailored for a sharp fit, this suit offers elegance, structure, and superior comfort. Designed for red-carpet events, weddings, receptions, and formal soirées, this tuxedo blends premium Italian craftsmanship with modern design aesthetics.

title: Luxury Black Embellished Tuxedo
description: Make a bold statement with this Luxury Black Embellished Tuxedo Suit, designed for men who appreciate refined elegance with a modern edge. Paired with sleek black trousers, this ensemble delivers a sharp, confident look perfect for red-carpet events, weddings, receptions, gala dinners, and high-end parties.

title: Elegant Black Velvet Tuxedo Set
description: Elevate your formal wardrobe with the Midnight Elegance Velvet Tuxedo, designed for black-tie events, weddings, and luxury evening occasions. This sophisticated tuxedo features a rich black velvet jacket with a textured satin shawl lapel that adds depth and refinement. Tailored for a sharp, modern silhouette, it pairs seamlessly with matching black trousers and a classic bow tie. Perfect for men who want a bold yet timeless statement of elegance and confidence.

title: Royal Plum
description: The Royal Plum Achkan features abstract pintucks embroidered with shimmering sequins, kathdana, and challa work — a majestic blend of texture and sparkle that commands attention.

title: Blue Aviary
description: An ode to elegance in motion, the Blue Aviary Achkan captures the spirit of flight and finesse. Crafted in a deep, royal blue hue, this statement piece features intricately embroidered bird motifs, brought to life with shimmering kathdana work that adds texture and subtle brilliance.

title: Black Mirage
description: A striking black hand-painted achkan featuring graceful flamingos set against bold abstract embroidery. A fusion of art and couture, where tradition meets contemporary expression.

title: The Noir Van
description: Intricate leaf motif embroidery delicately graces the silhouette, hand-worked in traditional techniques of kathdana, dabka, and kora, creating a luxe interplay of shimmer and shadow. Each element of embroidery is meticulously placed, echoing the elegance of nature in a regal black canvas.

title: Tangerine Trail
description: This bright orange linen satin Nehru jacket dazzles with vibrant appliqué in pinks, greens, and purples. Featuring intricate Aari embroidery, the floral motifs come alive with delicate needlework and rich texture. With its structured collar and artisanal craftsmanship, it’s the perfect statement piece for festive and special occasions.

title: Garden Lineage
description: A beige linen long Nehru jacket adorned with vibrant multicolor floral threadwork, blending natural elegance with artistic flair.

title: Lacy Grey
description: elegant ivory Nehru jacket featuring delicate lacy floral appliqués, intricate kathdana embroidery, and refined pintuck detailing. Paired with a kurta adorned with complementary floral embroidery, this ensemble exudes timeless grace and artisanal sophistication.

title: Sunburst Bloom
description: A vibrant yellow Nehru jacket adorned with multicolor flower embroidery crafted from resham, zari, and dabka threads. Paired with a pintuck-detailed kurta, this ensemble beautifully blends rich craftsmanship with modern elegance.

title: Purple Regalia
description: A regal purple Nehru jacket embellished with intricate silver and threadwork, featuring delicate pittah detailing. Paired with a kurta adorned with elegant floral motifs, this ensemble radiates sophistication and timeless craftsmanship.

title: Banjara Red
description: A striking red Nehru jacket richly embroidered with colorful threadwork depicting a serene bamboo scenery and lively woodpeckers. Paired with a kurta featuring complementary floral motifs, this ensemble blends nature-inspired artistry with vibrant elegance.

title: Sky Song
description: A soothing menthol-colored Nehru jacket featuring intricate bird and tree embroidery crafted with resham and dabka threads. Paired with a kurta detailed with graceful wavy pintucks, this ensemble combines nature-inspired artistry with refined tailoring.

title: Cherry Blossom
description: A sophisticated mint and ivory color-blocked Nehru jacket adorned with delicate cherry blossom and sea wave embroidery, crafted using intricate challa and kathdana work. Paired with a contemporary cut kurta, this ensemble blends traditional artistry with modern silhouettes.

title: Silver Seranade
description: A striking neon blue Nehru jacket featuring detailed silver embroidery depicting a scenic motif, crafted with dabka, kora, and kathdana techniques. Paired with an elegant ice-grey Chanderi kurta, this ensemble perfectly balances bold vibrance with timeless sophistication.

title: Cubic Ivory
description: An ivory Nehru jacket adorned with soft pastel embroidery and subtle zari work, paired with a matching cut kurta for a refined, monochromatic look that blends tradition with modernity.

title: Denim Shacket
description: A denim fabric shacket, blending the structure of a jacket with the comfort of a shirt. Crafted from mid-weight denim, this versatile piece features contrast ivory stitchline detailing that adds a refined, tailored touch against the rugged texture of the denim. Designed for both utility and style, the shacket includes two front patch pockets with flaps, enhancing its workwear-inspired aesthetic while providing functional storage. The structured collar and button-down front complete the look, making it perfect for layering over a tee or under a heavier coat.

title: Apex Drift
description: A bomber jacket crafted from textured linen fabric featuring thin black and white stripes, creating a sleek and modern base. It showcases vibrant patchwork of F1 sports cars, caps, and helmets, intricately arranged to form a dynamic and energetic design that captures the thrill of racing culture. Each patch adds depth and personality, blending sporty elements with classic bomber styling. A statement piece that perfectly balances refined texture with bold motorsport-inspired motifs.

title: Terra Nomad
description: This olive green bomber jacket features a distinctive extended panel adorned with striking black patchwork, adding depth and contrast to the design. The panel is richly embellished with sleek leather cords and beads arranged in abstract patterns, creating a dynamic interplay of texture and form. Combining rugged elegance with artisanal detail, this jacket makes a bold statement while maintaining versatile, contemporary appeal.

title: Azure Mirage
description: This light blue suede bomber jacket features exquisite patchwork  blends of softness and sparkle, adorned with an array of sequins and beads in various pastel colors. The embellishments are artfully scattered across the front, back, and sleeves, creating a harmonious, shimmering effect that catches the light from every angle. The delicate pastel palette adds a fresh, dreamy vibe to the luxurious suede texture, making this jacket a perfect statement piece that’s both elegant and playful.

title: Midnight Bloom
description: This dark blue suede bomber jacket is a masterpiece of intricate craftsmanship, featuring delicate Dori threadwork in pastel pinks and blues arranged in a graceful waterfall pattern along the front. Complementing this is a vibrant, hand-embroidered floral design rendered in a variety of traditional techniques, bringing depth and texture to the piece. The artistry continues with a matching floral motif embroidered on the back, creating a harmonious balance between front and back. Soft pastel hues beautifully contrast with the rich suede, making this jacket a refined fusion of elegance and contemporary style.

title: Smoke Canvas
description: A grey denim bomber jacket stands out with its unique blend of hand-painted detailing in lighter grey tones, creating a soft, artistic contrast against the rugged fabric. The surface is further enhanced with precise machine stitch lines that add structure and depth, while subtle grey bead embellishments introduce a refined texture and understated sparkle. Designed with functional patch pockets, this piece merges utility with creativity—offering a modern, wearable canvas of craftsmanship and style.

title: Off-White Shorts
description: These off-white shorts, tailored from smooth terry wool fabric, offer a refined twist on utilitarian style. Designed for both comfort and function, they feature clean side pockets, buttoned back pockets, and a distinctive cargo-style zipped pocket on the thigh—perfect for a modern, street-smart edge. The crisp off-white hue adds a fresh, versatile look, making these shorts a go-to for elevated casual wear with a utility-inspired touch.

title: Brown Trouser
description: Tailored in rich dark brown Terry wool, these wide-leg trousers offer a refined blend of comfort and style. The soft yet structured fabric drapes elegantly, while the long, extended waist belt adds a distinctive, contemporary detail. With a high-rise fit and fluid silhouette, these trousers are perfect for creating effortlessly sophisticated looks—ideal for both workwear and elevated everyday dressing.

title: Denim Trousers
description: Crafted from durable charcoal grey denim, these trousers offer a modern take on a classic silhouette. Distinct white stitch lines trace every seam and outline the pockets, adding a crisp contrast and highlighting the garment's structure. Designed for both style and longevity, the tailored fit ensures a sharp look while maintaining everyday comfort. Whether dressed up or down, these trousers are a versatile addition to any wardrobe.

title: Tropical Taana Linen Bomber Jacket
description: A contemporary take on a classic silhouette, this linen bomber jacket features a striking Hawaiian-inspired motif on the back, intricately rendered in cross-stitch embroidery. The design, centered around three expressive faces, draws from traditional Hawaiian art and mythology. This vibrant motif brings a sense of storytelling and island culture to the piece. The front includes two practical patch pockets, while stitchline detailing on the collar and cuffs—matched to the embroidery palette—ties the entire look together. Blending cultural depth with modern craftsmanship, this jacket is a bold yet refined expression of laid-back tropical spirit.

title: Voyage Thread Ivory Stretchable Bomber Jacket
description: This ivory stretchable bomber jacket features a captivating abstract illusion of a ship, meticulously brought to life through cross-stitch embroidery. Crafted using two shades of blue for depth and movement, with a striking red thread highlight, the design offers a modern interpretation of nautical themes with a bold artistic twist.Executed entirely by hand, the cross-stitch technique reflects hours of dedicated craftsmanship, where each precise stitch contributes to the overall complexity and texture of the piece. Matching stitchline detailing on the collar and back further enhances the cohesive design, making this bomber a refined fusion of comfort, art, and artisanal excellence.

title: Michael Jackson Navy Blue Shirt
description: A navy blue shirt in giza cotton featuring an applique of Michael Jackson in his signature pose. The applique is enhanced with silver and black katdana highlighting, adding texture and a subtle shimmer that accentuates the figure. The shirt is otherwise minimal, allowing the detailed work to stand out. Crafted with a clean finish and soft hand feel, it blends comfort with a stikiing visual statement.

title: Toucan Ice Blue Linen Shirt
description: An ice blue linen shirt features a vibrant applique design of a toucan bird perched on a twig capturing a tropical essence with intricate stitching. The applique work brings the bird and the foliage to life, with carefully layered fabrics and fine thread detailing. It also has matching details non the cuff and the collar that mirrors the design, offering subtle coordination without overpowering the natural beauty of the main motif. Lightweight and breathable, the shirt combines artistic expression with refined texture of linen, making it both a stylish and comfortable choice.

title: Glazing Dark Navy Cotton Shirt
description: A dark navy cotton shirt elegantly adorned with grey Katdana embroidery running alongside the button placket. The intricate beadwork spans a width of 3.5 to 4 inches, adding a refined shimmer and a touch of texture to the minimalist silhouette. A sophisticated piece that blends subtle embellishment with timeless style.

title: Strip Pipe Dark Navy Cotton Shirt
description: A dark navy cotton shirt featuring a sleek, technically constructed pleat embedded with navy blue shiny metallic strips, designed to catch the light and draw the eye. Alongside the pleat runs intricate black Katdana embroidery in a V shaped pattern, adding texture and subtle sparkle. The combination of structure and embellishment creates a modern, visually striking look with refined elegance.

title: Flamingo Charcoal Grey Cotton Shirt
description: A charcoal grey cotton shirt featuring a striking geometric pattern that subtly incorporates a flamingo motif, embroidered in two shades of grey to harmonize with the base color. The design blends structure with elegance, enhanced by coordinated detailing on the collar, cuffs, and back, creating a cohesive and contemporary look with a refined artistic touch.

title: Ladder Brown Cotton Shirt
description: A brown cotton shirt featuring intricate 3D hand embroidery in an abstract design that evokes a mountain scape and a stylized ladder form. Crafted with tonal threads and elevated by subtle beige highlights, the embroidery creates depth and visual interest. Thoughtful thread detailing on the collar, cuffs, and back enhances the overall design, making this shirt a refined blend of texture, symbolism, and understated artistry.

title: Galaxy Charcoal Grey Cotton Shirt
description: A charcoal grey cotton shirt featuring a striking vertical representation of the solar system in abstract form, brought to life through intricate hand embroidery using French knots and detailed thread techniques. Each planetary element is thoughtfully rendered, adding texture and dimension to the design. Leather accents on the collar, cuffs, and back lend a modern, edgy contrast. The shirt's unique button placket — with the first three buttons concealed and the last four left visible — adds a distinctive style twist to this contemporary, art-inspired piece.

title: Abridge Red Wine Cotton Shirt
description: A red wine cotton shirt featuring an abstract all-over pattern brought to life with vibrant hand embroidery in multiple colors. Showcasing a mix of traditional techniques, each stitch adds depth and texture, creating a dynamic, artistic finish. Complementing embroidery details on the collar, cuffs, and back enhance the design, blending craftsmanship with contemporary style.

title: Pipe Blocks Navy Blue Cotton Shirt
description: A navy blue cotton shirt designed with minimal pintuck detailing on the front beside the button placket offering subtle texture and structure. Alongside the pintucks, katdana embellishments in grey colour are arranged in a vertical block pattern, adding a refined shimmer and geometric precision . The overall look is understated yet elevated , balancing clean tailoring with delicate handwork for a sophisticated finish.

title: Chain Stitch Ivory Linen Shirt
description: An ivory linen shirt brought to life with abstract chain stitch embroidery in vibrant colours, creating a striking yet artistic look. The embroidery flows organically across the front, showcasing dynamic patterns and bold threadwork. The cuff, collar and back feature coordinated detailing- not heavily embroidered, but carefully aligned in design and colour, echoing the main design and adding a sense of thoughtful harmony.

title: Last Leaf Red Wine Cotton Shirt
description: A red wine cotton shirt featuring a hand embroidered floral leaf motif on the chest , accentured with fine beadwork for a touch of elegance. The collar and cuffs are finished with subtle detailing that complements the design. The back remains sleek with a small, tasteful detail near the yoke for a balanced finish.

title: Abstract Kantha
description: An olive giza cotton shirt showcasing a striking pattern created with vibrant  threads using traditional kantha stitches adding layered texture and movement . The intricate embroidery extends to the collar, cuffs and the back  complimenting the main design bringing a rich handcrafted depth to the shirt while maintaining an artistic and contemporary feel.

title: Leather Cord Arrow Black Shirt
description: A black shirt in giza cotton showcases black leather cords arranged in a bold arrow pattern across the front. The look is elevated with sleek leather detailing on the collar, cuffs and back , adding a  modern edgy touch to the design.

title: Illustrated Map  Beige Full Sleeved Linen Shirt
description: A beige full sleeved linen shirt depicting a map of Cuba rendered though delicate hand embroidery techniques satin stitch, back stitch and french knots subtly outlining the geography, blending clean design with artisanal detail.

title: Mighty Wolf Black Shirt
description: A black shirt featuring a powerful wolf, intricately embroidered using sequins, katdanas, beads and dabka work to create depth. The texturing brings the wolf to life with its intense detail on the eye highlighted with maroon thread adding depth and focus to the design.

title: Amalfi Coast Ivory Pure Linen Shirt
description: An ivory pure linen shirt features hand embroidery that portrays the Amalfi Coast , using a mix of stitches for the terraced hills and create textures along the cliffs. The houses are outlined  with delicate stitches while the sun is rendered in radiant colours to capture its warmth. The combination of techniques brings the vibrant coastal scene to life on the fabric. It also has details on the cuff, collar and shirt back.

title: Mexican Offwhite Linen Full Sleeved Shirt
description: An off white linen full sleeved shirt embroidered with bold mexican motifs arranged in a pattern like intricate florals , geometric shapes and symbolic motifs are brought to life with bright , vivid  satin stitches , french knots to create depth and textures. the vibrant colours like reds , blues , yellows, greens, browns are thoughtfully placed to create a harmonious eye-catching arrangement, capturing the essence of mexican traditions.

title: Mt. Fuji Ivory Pure Linen Shirt
description: An ivory pure linen shirt featuring intricate hand embroidery and hand painting, showcasing the majestic Mt. Fuji. The embroidery uses traditional aari stitch and French knots techniques  creating textured peaks and lush landscapes around the mountain. Subtle hand painted details add  depth and colour , bringing the scene to life with rich blues and soft earth tones while each brushstroke captures the serene beauty of the Japanese scenery. It also has  details on the collar , cuff and the back.

title: Quirky  Olive Green Giza Cotton Full Sleeved Shirt
description: An olive green giza cotton full sleeved shirt with patchwork embroidery depicting a quirky face done on the back using mustard, navy ,red wine and a printed fabric with a patch pocket on the front and with detailed sleeve and collar.

title: Puddle Brown Shirt In Giza Cotton
description: A brown shirt in giza cotton embroidered using  leather cords with tone on tone resham depicting an abstract flow pattern which is continued on the sleeves with details on the cuff and the collar and back as well.
